query:
SELECT vendedorId, COUNT(*) as extrações, MIN(dataExtracao) as primeira, MAX(dataExtracao) as ultima 
FROM metricas 
WHERE mes = 'Novembro/2025' 
GROUP BY vendedorId 
ORDER BY vendedorId 
LIMIT 5;
